analyses.title: Capability Without Stewardship
analyses.desc: Technology keeps reorganizing civilization faster than civilization can respond. This is not a new problem. It is a systems problem. And it finally has a science.

articles.title: Energy Envelopes and Feedback Loops: Why Pacing Works When Rest Doesn't
articles.desc: A systems-level explanation of why rest alone fails ME/CFS patients, and what the feedback dynamics actually suggest.

articles.title: Reader-First: Why Most Writing Begins at the Wrong End
articles.desc: The dominant writing advice is backwards for expository and instructional writing.

articles.title: Pattern Is the Message: On Systems Science as Meta-Discipline
articles.desc: Systems science doesn't study a domain — it studies the structure underneath all domains.

research.title: The ISRD Framework
research.desc: Nine core concepts in three tiers — from the ontology of complex systems to the operators of effective intervention.

research.title: ISRD Research Foundations
research.desc: The theoretical lineages, empirical evidence bases, and applied frameworks that underlie all ISRD work — across biological systems, learning science, and information systems.

courses.ss101: A wiki-style reference for core systems science concepts — feedback, attractors, emergence, and more.
courses.general-systems-theory: The foundational framework — wholeness, emergence, hierarchy, and open systems.
courses.cybernetics: Control, communication, and feedback in natural and engineered systems.
courses.complexity-science: Emergence, self-organization, attractors, and complex adaptive systems.
courses.systems-dynamics: Modeling and simulation of dynamic feedback systems over time.
courses.systems-practice: An integrated practice framework — blending the theories into a unified toolkit for building, diagnosing, and evolving complex systems.

ss101.title: What Is Systems Science?
ss101.desc: An introduction to systems science as the grammar beneath all sciences — and why it matters in practice.

ss101.title: Feedback Loops
ss101.desc: Reinforcing and balancing feedback — the engine of all dynamic behavior, and how feedback structure defines attractor states.

ss101.title: Emergence
ss101.desc: Why the whole is more than the sum of its parts, and how attractor landscapes shape emergent behavior.

products.title: ISRD for Digital Creators
products.desc: Applying complex systems science to the design and development of ebooks, courses, instructional content, and other information-rich digital work.
